mapper.update: update member set member_status = 'INACTIVE' where member_idx = #{memberIdx}
mapper.select: select member_password from member where member_idx = #{memberIdx}
mapper.insert: insert into member(member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_phone, member_role_type, default_delivery_address_idx, member_status) values(#{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberRoleType}, #{defaultDeliveryAddressIdx}, #{memberStatus})
